required_preferences.fact: Frequently eats lunch alone or with her mother during weekdays at her parents' home, as she spends midday supporting her father’s recovery; does not prioritize meals with her partner

supersedes.fact: Prioritizes quick, shared lunches with her partner between work sessions instead of solo meals on busy weekdays

required_preferences.fact: Openly discusses business stress and challenges with her partner during dinner, using their shared home workspace as an opportunity to collaborate and decompress together

supersedes.fact: Never discusses business stress with her partner during dinner; reserves that time for personal conversation

required_preferences.fact: Schedules brief daily rest breaks in a dark, quiet environment to proactively manage migraine symptoms
Travels for mini wellness retreats within California twice a year; never takes international vacations
Keeps a detailed budget spreadsheet updated daily; never relies on mental math or ballpark figures for spending decisions
Reviews direct feedback and comments from educational livestreams each week, adapting her product messaging based on audience questions

persona: An early-stage entrepreneur launching a direct-to-consumer skincare brand
